name: Burst Drive
short_description: DASH, BOOST, DRIFT, SHOOT! A challenging space shooter with tons of eye candy. A game to master for the highest score or to have a break with while waiting for other games or just to have some couch co-op fun.
detailed_description:
Burst Drive is just about blowing up colorful aliens and seeing how far you can go before getting overwhelmed.

DEEP DIVE

  • Steer your fighter and boost around! Drift, line 'em up and fire away!
  • Shooting generates heat!
    Collect and buy extra cooling or drift to release the excess heat.
  • Dash around! Double-tap boost for a short, evasive maneuver.
  • One shot, one kill! If you are hit without your shields, you'll lose a life.
    Disengage until your AEGIS shields quickly recover.
  • Upgrade your ship via the shop between sectors.
    Buy items for your dash, extra shields, weapons and more!
  • 50 levels that repeat and get harder with each loop in different ways.
    Slain the boss? Get ready for the real action!
  • Optional two-player local co-op with extra controllers or from the same keyboard!
    Or use your mouse to aim and steer! Have it your way!
  • Steam Leaderboards!
  • Colorful graphics and lots of explosions!

Can you beat all 50 levels?
Then maybe go a little further for a real challenge? ;)
